name: Dudunsparce

forms.name: Three-Segment
forms.pokedexDescription: The gentle Dudunsparce will put Pokémon that wander into its nest onto its back and carry them to the entrance.

forms.name: Mega-X
forms.pokedexDescription: Mega Evolution has awakened its dormant genes, elongating its body into a serpent-like form. Using its tiny wings, it flies through the air as if pretending to be a majestic dragon.

forms.name: Mega-X-Three-Segment
forms.pokedexDescription: Mega Evolution has awakened its dormant genes, elongating its body into a serpent-like form. Using its tiny wings, it flies through the air as if pretending to be a majestic dragon.

forms.name: Mega-Y
forms.pokedexDescription: Mega Evolution has awakened its dormant genes, causing its wings to grow large allowing it to take flight. By flapping its wings it can stir up hurricanes to attack its foes.

forms.name: Mega-Y-Three-Segment
forms.pokedexDescription: Mega Evolution has awakened its dormant genes, causing its wings to grow large allowing it to take flight. By flapping its wings it can stir up hurricanes to attack its foes.

pokedexDescription: This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles.
